description:
Hi I’m Liezl! I like to make and share simple, healthy recipes that actually taste good. You won’t find anything too complicated or time-consuming here! 
I previously lost more than 40 lbs by changing the way that I eat (I've shared some of my weight-loss journey on my channel). One of the things that helped me lose weight was meal prepping because then I didn't have to count any calories. I still meal prep almost every week to make it easier to keep eating healthy, because I find that when I eat healthier foods, I feel better physically and mentally.
All my recipes are dairy-free, wheat-free, and mostly gluten-free - just FYI in case you have food allergies like me.

I also have a blog where you can find the recipes I share on my channel + my ebooks: liezljayne.com

Social media - 
instagram + tiktok @liezljayne

description:
Welcome to my channel!

This is the home of my podcast, Working Hard, Hardly Working, plus snippets of my life as an entrepreneur. 

I started this podcast as my own personal school of life. I’m fascinated by the many ways that we define success and how people who have 'achieved it' stay at the top. What are their daily non-negotiables? How do they keep balance? What do they regret?

From housing campaigners to investors and sex experts, no avenue is off limits. I want you to leave every conversation with a new perspective on working hard and some actionable advice too.

So, get ready to take notes, here’s what you need to know to build the life you dream of.

description:
Elderfit has one mission — to help people over 60 transform their lives by improving strength, balance, mobility, and independence through exercise.

Founded by Tom and Gareth, Elderfit has been supporting older adults for over 10 years, delivering live classes and coaching that have helped thousands become stronger, more confident, and more active.

How We Help

We support the over-60s community in four key ways:

1, Free online fitness routines and education via Youtube
2, Personalised coaching and tailored exercise programs worldwide for less than £1 a day via elderfittv.com (also available through the Elderfit TV app)
3, Free tips, guidance, and exercise help through our newsletter
4, Live in-person classes across Wales, UK

Enjoy the free content. To get started on the exercise programs and coaching use the links below.

description:
Namaste 🙏🏼 

I am Sonal Sharma. I practice and teach Ashtanga yoga along with my brother Sandeep. 

We started our yoga journey in 2015 with Iyengar Yoga in Pune. After three years we decided to learn Ashtanga Yoga from our Guruji in Mysore and till date we are practicing the sequence of asanas and pranayama on regular basis to understand its effects on the body and mind. 

When we talk about yoga the aim should be to control our thoughts as a thought reflects our breath and our breath reflects our body. So, we start by the gross which is our body. Preparing the body via asana practice. And then preparing the mind via breath control. It takes commitment of daily practice to achieve this and certain changes in the lifestyle. If the discipline is strong it can be achieved with ease. 

Our website: www.ashtangayogashraya.com

Instagram ID sonalsharmayoga  sandeep_sharma_yoga 🙏🏼🌸

description:
Welcome to King Stoic, Your Gateway to the World of Stoic Philosophy!

description:
Hallo ihr Lieben,

Ich bin Charan Amrit Kaur und habe vor 6 Jahren begonnen meine große Leidenschaft zu teilen: das Kundalini Yoga, Meditation und auch die Sat Nam Rasayan Heilung. Ich bin zertifizierte Yoga-Lehrerin, Heilerin und Rohkostchefin. 

Das erste Mal habe ich tatsächlich vor 20 Jahren Kundalini Yoga praktiziert und es war Liebe auf den ersten Blick. Die Wirkung auf Körper, Geist und Seele ist unbeschreiblich. Nach einer Stunde fühlt man sich geklärt, ruhig, gelassen und mit seiner Seele verbunden. Die Praxis hat mein Leben so bereichert und meine Entwicklung in allen Bereichen gefördert. Meine Mission ist es die  Werkzeuge und die Praxis mit möglichst vielen Menschen zu teilen. 

Es ist wunderbar für alle Yoga-Anfänger, wie auch für Fortgeschrittene. 
Tiefe Heilung wird möglich und somit auch wahre Potentialsentfaltung. Viel Freude auf meinem Kanal!

Mehr Infos zur Live Praxis findest du hier:

www.charan-amrit-kaur.de/yoga-tribe/

Sat Nam!

description:
Do you know WHY I know this channel is FOR YOU?

We may not know each other personally, but I know with ABSOLUTE CERTAINTY that many times you’ve lacked the right TOOLS to handle stress, uncertainty, and all the challenges of daily life. So, how would you feel if I told you that HERE you’ll find the way to overcome them?

In this space, we’ll dive into the fascinating world of Stoic philosophy—an ancient school of thought that has endured through the centuries and remains deeply relevant in our modern lives. We’ll explore the teachings of great thinkers such as Seneca, Epictetus, and Marcus Aurelius. On this channel, we’ll share profound reflections, practical advice, and inspiring tools based on Stoic philosophy.

🔔 DON’T FORGET TO SUBSCRIBE!

The knowledge you’ll only find HERE has an INCALCULABLE VALUE that will CHANGE YOUR LIFE.

For any questions, feel free to contact me:

stoicphilosophy.channel@gmail.com

full_name: Mindful Yoga with Jessie - for Women Physicians
description:
For women physicians who love Yoga with Adriene but want practices designed for our nervous systems, workloads, and burnout patterns.
Free mindful yoga created by Jessie Mahoney, MD—pediatrician, mindfulness teacher, and physician coach—for women physicians.
Classes blend gentle movement, hatha and yin yoga, breathing, and nervous-system-aware coaching to reduce stress and anxiety, interrupt burnout and over-responsibility, soften perfectionism, and help you reconnect with presence and ease.

This is a supportive space for women physicians who want to feel better in medicine and in life. Many who practice here go on to join Jessie for coaching and mindfulness-based CME wellness retreats for deeper, lasting change.

Explore retreats and coaching at http://www.jessiemahoneymd.com and subscribe for weekly classes.
